title: New Zealand Dollar remains subdued as US Dollar gains on renewed Hormuz tensions
summary: NZD/USD inches lower for the second successive day, trading around 0.5700 during the Asian hours on Tuesday. The currency pair depreciates as the US Dollar (USD) holds ground, which could be attributed to the renewed geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: United States Dollar Index holds below 101.00 as fading Fed hike bets counter Hormuz risks
summary: The US Dollar Index (DXY), which tracks the Greenback against a basket of currencies, struggles for a firm near-term direction and extends its consolidative price moves for the third straight day on Tuesday.

title: Euro Summer range holds against US Dollar – Commerzbank
summary: Commerzbank’s Volkmar Baur notes EUR/USD has been stuck between 1.1350 and 1.1450 since mid-June, with few catalysts expected over the summer.

title: Japanese Yen ticks up above 162.00 US Dollar and eases intervention risks

title: Canadian Dollar weakens despite higher oil prices
summary: USD/CAD gains ground for the third successive day, trading around 1.4210 during the European hours on Tuesday. The pair appreciates as the US Dollar (USD) holds ground, which could be attributed to the renewed geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold hangs near daily low as rising US bond yields underpin USD amid Hormuz risks
summary: Gold (XAU/USD) retains intraday negative bias through the early European session on Tuesday, though it holds above the $4,100 mark. Crude oil prices edge higher amid renewed tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, reviving inflationary concerns.
